title: Vacuum cleaner
abstract: A handheld vacuum cleaner comprises a pistol grip which is positioned generally transverse to a longitudinal axis of the vacuum cleaner that runs from a front end to a rear end thereof. It also comprises an air inlet positioned forward of the pistol grip, and a vacuum motor configured to draw dirty air into a dirt separator of the vacuum cleaner through the air inlet and exhaust clean air from the vacuum cleaner through an air outlet. The handheld vacuum cleaner further comprises an electronic visual display which faces generally rearwards. The handheld vacuum cleaner may be part of a stick vacuum cleaner.
claims: Claims 1 . A handheld vacuum cleaner comprising: a pistol grip which is positioned generally transverse to a longitudinal axis of the vacuum cleaner that runs from a front end to a rear end thereof; an air inlet positioned forward of the pistol grip; a vacuum motor configured to draw dirty air into a dirt separator of the vacuum cleaner through the air inlet, and exhaust clean air from the vacuum cleaner through an air outlet; and an electronic visual display which faces generally rearwards. 2. A handheld vacuum cleaner according to claim 1 wherein the electronic visual display is a screen. 3. A handheld vacuum cleaner according to claim 1 or 2 wherein the electronic visual display is configured to selectively display at least two different colours. 4. A handheld vacuum cleaner according to any preceding claim wherein the electronic visual display is substantially planar, and is positioned at an angle of no more than 20 degrees to the longitudinal axis. 5. A handheld vacuum cleaner according to any preceding claim wherein the electronic visual display is positioned axially rearwards of the pistol grip. 6. A handheld vacuum cleaner according to any preceding claim wherein the pistol grip is positionable in a generally vertical orientation when the longitudinal axis is horizontal, the pistol grip extending from a lower end configured to be gripped by the little finger and/or ring finger of the user to an upper end configured to be gripped by the index finger and/or middle finger of the user, and the electronic visual display is positioned radially above the pistol grip. 7. A handheld vacuum cleaner according to any preceding claim wherein the electronic visual display projects through or is visible through an aperture in a user-removable component. 8. A handheld vacuum cleaner according to claim 7 wherein the user removable component comprises a pre-motor filter member which is positionable in a fluid path upstream of the vacuum motor. 9. A handheld vacuum cleaner according to claim 7 or 8 wherein the user removable component comprises a post-motor filter member which is positionable in a fluid path downstream of the vacuum motor 10. A handheld vacuum cleaner according to any preceding claim further comprising a control member configured to receive a control input from a user, the control member being positioned adjacent to the electronic visual display. 1 1 . A handheld vacuum cleaner according to claim 10 wherein the control member faces generally rearwards. 12. A handheld vacuum cleaner according to any preceding claim wherein the longitudinal axis intersects the electronic visual display. 13. A handheld vacuum cleaner according to any preceding claim wherein the dirt separator has a generally cylindrical outer wall which is substantially concentrically positioned around the longitudinal axis. 14. A handheld vacuum cleaner according to claim 13 wherein said outer wall defines a dirt collection chamber. 15. A stick vacuum cleaner comprising: a handheld vacuum cleaner according to any one of claims 1 -14; a cleaner head defining a suction opening; and an elongate rigid wand defining a suction path which extends from the cleaner head to the air inlet of the handheld vacuum cleaner, the wand being positioned substantially parallel to longitudinal axis.
